goal: HTML output visually identical to original PPTX rendering

acceptanceCriteria: No background-color CSS on .shape div when SVG is used — VERIFIED: 0 leaks across all files

stroke-width matches ln w EMU→pt — VERIFIED: default 1pt applied

acceptanceCriteria: #0070C0 present in HTML — VERIFIED
White text on dark shapes visible — VERIFIED
22 unique text colors detected — VERIFIED

stories.title: Image crop shows correct visible region
acceptanceCriteria: 27 cropped images with object-fit:fill — VERIFIED
px offset approach eliminates extreme scaling — VERIFIED
